name: healthcare_municipal_bond_covenant_kestrel_car_fair
premise: Tele-ICU coverage ends at midnight; rural spoke hospitals are asking for a protocol exception to keep higher-acuity patients locally. In Healthcare, the situation tagged internally around healthcare municipal bond covenant kestrel car fair has converged with local pressure in the Stonehaven corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. A reporter has partial screenshots; if the official narrative shifts later, the organization risks a false-information allegation. Middle management filtered an escalation; the executive on point is hearing some details for the first time on this bridge. A hard operational cutoff hits in under twenty minutes unless a named executive posts a decision in the command log. Framing has already hardened externally as care against fairness; internal nuance will not survive the first news cycle unless it is extremely careful.

agents.name: Mira Navarro
agents.identity: I am Mira Navarro, the senior manager who must reconcile legal, ops, and customer-facing reality in one decision in Healthcare. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat fairness as disposable collateral every time care spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Omar Hughes
agents.identity: I am Omar Hughes, the risk and equity liaison pushing back on silent harms in Healthcare. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so care cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes fairness in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will redirect resources to the smallest cohort first where harm is most concentrated, documenting tradeoffs openly—privileging fairness dimensions of fairness.
I will optimize for aggregate harm reduction across the whole population immediately—privileging the utilitarian reading of care even where distribution gets rough.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Silence will be interpreted as a decision by everyone outside this room. Mira Navarro must choose under care versus fairness. What does Mira Navarro do?
